enrichment.short_description: Rapid7 is a managed cybersecurity platform offering MDR, exposure management, vulnerability management, and cloud security (CNAPP).
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Rapid7 delivers managed detection and response, exposure management, and cloud security through its Command platform for 11,000+ organizations.

features.title: Managed Detection and Response (MDR)
features.description: 24x7 XDR monitoring, remediation, and digital forensics/incident response from Rapid7 experts.

features.title: Exposure Management
features.description: Continuous assessment of an organization's attack surface with contextual risk prioritization.

features.title: Attack Surface Management (ASM)
features.description: Unified asset visibility across an organization's digital estate.

features.title: Next-Gen SIEM
features.description: Cloud-first threat detection and centralized security event analysis.

features.title: Cloud Security (CNAPP)
features.description: Protection and posture management across multi-cloud environments.

features.title: Vulnerability Management
features.description: Risk assessment and remediation guidance across hybrid IT environments.

features.title: Application Security
features.description: Security testing and monitoring for custom application code.

pros: Broad security platform spanning MDR, vulnerability management, cloud security, and SIEM under one company
24/7 human-led SOC combined with AI-driven detection
Serves more than 11,000 organizations globally across multiple industries
Integrated 'Command' platform reduces need for multiple point tools
cons: Pricing is not published on the site and requires contacting sales for a quote
Founding year and headquarters are not disclosed on the pages reviewed
Enterprise-oriented product suite aimed primarily at organizations with dedicated security teams

faqs.question: What does Rapid7 offer?
faqs.answer: Rapid7 offers managed detection and response, exposure and vulnerability management, cloud security (CNAPP), next-gen SIEM, threat intelligence, and application security, unified under its Command platform.

faqs.question: Is Rapid7 pricing publicly listed?
faqs.answer: No, Rapid7 does not publish pricing on its site; prospective customers must contact sales.

faqs.question: Does Rapid7 use AI?
faqs.answer: Yes, Rapid7 markets its platform as 'AI-powered' with an AI engine supporting its security operations alongside human analysts.

faqs.question: Who uses Rapid7?
faqs.answer: Rapid7 states it serves more than 11,000 global organizations, including customers in finance, transportation, entertainment, and manufacturing.

use_cases.title: Managed threat detection and response
use_cases.description: Organizations without a large in-house SOC use Rapid7's MDR for 24/7 monitoring and incident response.

use_cases.title: Attack surface and vulnerability management
use_cases.description: Continuous scanning and prioritization of vulnerabilities across hybrid environments.

use_cases.title: Cloud security posture
use_cases.description: CNAPP capabilities to secure multi-cloud infrastructure.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Rapid7?
paragraphs: Rapid7 is a cybersecurity company that provides an integrated platform, branded Rapid7 Command, covering managed detection and response, exposure management, vulnerability management, cloud security, next-gen SIEM, threat intelligence, and application security.
The company states it serves more than 11,000 organizations worldwide and combines 24/7 human-led SOC monitoring with AI-assisted detection.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Rapid7 is for
paragraphs: Rapid7 targets mid-market and enterprise organizations that need managed security operations, attack surface visibility, and vulnerability management, spanning industries such as finance, transportation, manufacturing, and entertainment.

enrichment.short_description: Huntress is a managed cybersecurity platform providing 24/7 human-led threat detection across endpoints, identities, and SIEM for SMBs and MSPs.
enrichment.starting_price: $2.08/month per user (Managed SAT); per-product pricing varies, e.g. $8.99/month per endpoint for Managed EDR
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Huntress is a managed security platform offering 24/7 human-led EDR, identity threat detection, SIEM, and security awareness training for SMBs and MSPs.

features.title: Managed EDR
features.description: Endpoint detection and response with 24/7 SOC monitoring, starting at $8.99/month per endpoint (50-endpoint minimum).

features.title: Managed ITDR
features.description: Identity Threat Detection and Response for Microsoft 365 and Google Workspace, at $4.80/month per identity.

features.title: Managed SIEM
features.description: Security information and event management billed per data source, at $4.00/month per source.

features.title: Managed SAT
features.description: Security awareness training with phishing simulations, at $2.08/month per learner.

features.title: Managed ISPM
features.description: Identity Security Posture Management that hardens Microsoft 365 configurations, at $4.00/month per identity.

features.title: Managed ESPM
features.description: Endpoint Security Posture Management, currently listed as coming soon.

pros: Transparent, published per-unit pricing across all core products
24/7 human-led Security Operations Center backing every plan
Covers endpoints, identities, SIEM data sources, and security awareness training in one vendor
Full-featured free trial available
cons: Each product requires a 50-unit minimum (endpoints, identities, sources, or learners)
Standard contracts run 12 months
Managed ESPM is not yet generally available
Headquarters and company size are not disclosed on the pages reviewed

faqs.question: Is there a free trial of Huntress?
faqs.answer: Yes, Huntress offers a full-featured trial with 24/7 SOC support.

faqs.question: What is the minimum size to buy Huntress?
faqs.answer: Each Huntress product (EDR, ITDR, SIEM, SAT, ISPM) has a 50-unit minimum, e.g. 50 endpoints or 50 learners.

faqs.question: When was Huntress founded?
faqs.answer: Huntress was founded in 2015.

faqs.question: Who is Huntress built for?
faqs.answer: Huntress targets small and mid-sized businesses and the managed service providers (MSPs) that support them.

use_cases.title: Outsourced 24/7 SOC for SMBs
use_cases.description: Small businesses without in-house security staff use Huntress's managed EDR and SIEM for continuous threat monitoring.

use_cases.title: MSP security stack
use_cases.description: Managed service providers resell Huntress products across their client base.

use_cases.title: Microsoft 365 / Google Workspace identity protection
use_cases.description: Managed ITDR and ISPM harden and monitor cloud identity platforms.
use_cases.audience: IT teams using Microsoft 365 or Google Workspace

features: Privilege escalation and login event monitoring

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Huntress?
paragraphs: Huntress, founded in 2015, is a managed cybersecurity platform that pairs a 24/7 human-led SOC with products for endpoint detection and response, identity threat detection, SIEM, security posture management, and security awareness training.
Pricing is published per unit for each product, with a 50-unit minimum, and the company states it serves 268,000+ organizations.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Huntress is for
paragraphs: Huntress is built for small and mid-sized businesses and the MSPs that serve them, across sectors including education, healthcare, financial services, manufacturing, law, and government.

enrichment.short_description: Vanta is a compliance automation platform that continuously monitors security controls and streamlines audits for SOC 2, ISO 27001, HIPAA, and other frameworks.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Vanta automates compliance monitoring, audit evidence collection, risk management, and vendor risk across SOC 2, ISO 27001, HIPAA, and more.

features.title: Automated Compliance
features.description: Continuous monitoring and status tracking across multiple compliance frameworks.

features.title: Risk Management
features.description: Centralized visualization and management of organizational risk.

features.title: Third-Party Risk Management (TPRM)
features.description: Vendor assessment and ongoing monitoring.

features.title: Audit Automation
features.description: Streamlined audit preparation and automated evidence collection.

features.title: Questionnaire Automation
features.description: AI-powered responses to incoming security questionnaires.

features.title: Trust Center
features.description: Public-facing dashboard that showcases an organization's compliance status.

features.title: Vanta AI Agent
features.description: AI assistant for drafting policies, completing questionnaires, and flagging compliance issues.

pros: Supports SOC 2, ISO 27001, HIPAA, GDPR, HITRUST, FedRAMP, CMMC, and 15+ other frameworks
AI agent automates policy drafting and security questionnaire responses
Integrates with 400+ tools
Used by 16,000+ customers across startups, mid-market, and enterprise
cons: Pricing across all tiers (Essentials, Plus, Professional, Enterprise) is quote-based and not published
Comparing plans requires requesting a demo since feature-to-price mapping isn't public
Company size is not disclosed on the site

faqs.question: Does Vanta publish its pricing?
faqs.answer: No, all Vanta plans (Essentials, Plus, Professional, Enterprise) require contacting sales for a custom quote.

faqs.question: What compliance frameworks does Vanta support?
faqs.answer: Vanta supports SOC 2, ISO 27001, HIPAA, GDPR, HITRUST, NIST AI RMF, ISO 42001, FedRAMP, CMMC, and 15+ additional frameworks.

faqs.question: When was Vanta founded?
faqs.answer: Vanta was founded in 2018.

faqs.question: Where is Vanta headquartered?
faqs.answer: Vanta lists San Francisco and New York, USA as its primary U.S. offices and operates as remote-first, with additional offices in Sydney, Dublin, and London.

use_cases.title: First-time SOC 2 or ISO 27001 certification
use_cases.description: Startups automate evidence collection to prepare for their first compliance audit.

use_cases.title: Ongoing GRC program management
use_cases.description: Mid-market and enterprise teams manage risk, audits, and multiple frameworks continuously.

use_cases.title: Vendor risk assessment
use_cases.description: Security teams use TPRM to assess and monitor third-party vendors.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Vanta?
paragraphs: Vanta, founded in 2018 and headquartered in San Francisco, is a compliance automation platform that continuously monitors security controls, automates audit evidence collection, and manages risk across frameworks like SOC 2, ISO 27001, HIPAA, and GDPR.
Its Vanta AI Agent assists with drafting policies, completing security questionnaires, and identifying compliance gaps.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Vanta is for
paragraphs: Vanta serves startups pursuing their first compliance certification as well as mid-market and enterprise teams that need ongoing GRC, risk, and vendor-risk management, across healthcare, fintech, government, and software industries.

enrichment.short_description: Fillout is an all-in-one form, quiz, and survey builder with drag-and-drop design, conditional logic, payments, and 50+ integrations.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Fillout is a drag-and-drop form, quiz, and survey builder with a free plan, AI tools, payments, and 50+ integrations for teams of any size.

features.title: Drag-and-drop builder
features.description: Customizable themes, fonts, logos, and CSS for building forms visually.

features.title: Smart form automation
features.description: Intelligent routing and conditional logic to reduce manual follow-up work.

features.title: Secure/login forms
features.description: Respondents can log in to edit their existing submissions.

features.title: Analytics and collaboration
features.description: Track response data and collaborate with a team in real time.

features.title: White-label options
features.description: Custom domains, branding control, and custom share links on higher tiers.

features.title: Multiple embed formats
features.description: Popup, slider, side tab, and full-screen embed options.

features.title: AI form/quiz/survey tools
features.description: AI-assisted creation of forms, quizzes, and surveys, plus a Google Forms import tool.

pros: Free plan includes 1,000 responses/month with unlimited forms, seats, and questions
No per-seat charges on any plan
AI-assisted form, quiz, and survey creation
50+ native integrations
cons: Branding removal, custom CSS, and custom fonts require the Pro plan ($40/month) or higher
Custom domains and form analytics require the Business plan ($75/month)
SSO and advanced audit logs are Enterprise-only and require a custom quote

faqs.question: Does Fillout have a free plan?
faqs.answer: Yes, Fillout's Free plan includes 1,000 responses/month with unlimited forms, seats, and questions.

faqs.question: What is Fillout's starting paid price?
faqs.answer: The Starter plan is $15/month ($180/year billed annually) for 2,000 responses/month.

faqs.question: Does Fillout charge per seat?
faqs.answer: No, Fillout states there are no per-seat charges on any plan.

faqs.question: Does Fillout use AI?
faqs.answer: Yes, Fillout offers an AI agent for form creation along with AI quiz, survey, and form builder tools.

use_cases.title: Lead-gen quizzes and surveys
use_cases.description: Marketers build quizzes and surveys using the AI-assisted builder and conditional logic.

use_cases.title: Internal data-collection forms
use_cases.description: Teams build secure, login-gated forms that respondents can edit after submission.

use_cases.title: Event registration and job applications
use_cases.description: Organizations use embeddable forms for registrations and applications.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Fillout?
paragraphs: Fillout is a form, quiz, and survey builder with a drag-and-drop editor, conditional logic, payments, and 50+ integrations, used by the company's stated 100,000+ organizations, including government, food-service, and nonprofit customers.
Its Free plan covers 1,000 responses/month with unlimited forms and seats, while paid Starter, Pro, and Business tiers add branding removal, custom domains, and analytics.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Fillout is for
paragraphs: Fillout suits marketers, operations teams, and nonprofits or public-sector organizations that need customizable, embeddable forms without per-seat pricing.

enrichment.short_description: Feathery is a forms and workflow automation platform for financial services firms, combining forms, e-signatures, document intelligence, and an AI assistant.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Feathery automates forms, e-signatures, and document intelligence for wealth management and insurance firms, with an AI assistant that builds workflows.

features.title: Forms
features.description: Pixel-perfect forms with advanced conditional logic.

features.title: Document Templates & eSignatures
features.description: Fill out, generate, and sign documents within a workflow.

features.title: Document Intelligence
features.description: Extracts structured data from documents with stated 98%+ accuracy.

features.title: Meeting & Audio Intelligence
features.description: Extracts data from meetings and audio recordings.

features.title: Collaborative Workflows
features.description: Multi-user approvals and routing across a workflow.

features.title: White Label Editor
features.description: Feathery's editor can be embedded directly into a company's own product.

features.title: Robin AI Assistant
features.description: Describe a workflow in plain language and Robin builds and deploys it.

pros: Free plan with unlimited questions, pages, seats, and conditions
SOC 2 Type II and HIPAA compliant
AI assistant (Robin) generates workflows from natural-language descriptions
150+ integrations including Salesforce, Guidewire, and HubSpot
cons: Free plan is capped at 500 monthly submissions and 5 live forms
Growth and Business plan pricing is quote-based and not published
Positioned specifically for financial services rather than general-purpose forms

faqs.question: Does Feathery have a free plan?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Free plan includes unlimited questions, seats, pages, and conditions, with 500 monthly submissions and 5 live forms.

faqs.question: Is Feathery's paid pricing public?
faqs.answer: No, the Growth and Business plans require contacting sales for a custom quote.

faqs.question: Who is Feathery built for?
faqs.answer: Feathery targets registered investment advisors, broker-dealers, banks, insurance carriers, and insurance brokers.

faqs.question: Does Feathery use AI?
faqs.answer: Yes, its Robin AI assistant builds and deploys workflows from natural-language descriptions, and Document Intelligence extracts structured data automatically.

use_cases.title: Wealth management account opening
use_cases.description: RIAs and broker-dealers use Feathery forms and e-signatures to speed up account opening.

use_cases.title: Insurance quoting
use_cases.description: Insurance carriers use Feathery to reduce time-to-quote.

use_cases.title: Broker proposal generation
use_cases.description: Insurance brokers and wholesalers automate proposal generation with Feathery workflows.

features: Custom monthly submissions and live forms

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Feathery?
paragraphs: Feathery is a forms and workflow automation platform built for financial services, combining forms with advanced logic, e-signatures, document intelligence, and audio/meeting data extraction.
Its Robin AI assistant lets users describe a workflow in plain language and have it built and deployed automatically.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Feathery is for
paragraphs: Feathery is built for registered investment advisors, broker-dealers, banks, insurance carriers, and insurance brokers automating client-facing paperwork and workflows.

enrichment.short_description: Formbricks is an open-source experience management platform for building and deploying surveys across websites, apps, and emails, with self-hosting available.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Formbricks is an open-source survey and experience management platform with a free Hobby plan, self-hosting, and multi-channel deployment.

features.title: Multi-channel surveys
features.description: Deploy surveys on websites, in emails, and within apps.

features.title: Event-based triggering
features.description: Launch surveys at specific moments in the user journey.

features.title: Audience segmentation
features.description: Target surveys based on custom user attributes.

features.title: Centralized analytics
features.description: Consolidate feedback across multiple touchpoints.

features.title: Open source & self-hosting
features.description: Full source code available on GitHub; can be self-hosted instead of using the cloud service.

features.title: AI labeling and translations
features.description: Scale/Pro plans include AI-based feedback labeling and AI translations.

pros: Fully open source with a self-hosting option
Free Hobby plan includes 250 responses/month and full API access
SOC 2 Type II and ISO 27001 certified
14-day free trial of Pro features with no credit card required
cons: Response volume beyond the free tier requires Pro ($74/month) or Scale ($325/month)
AI feedback labeling and quota management are limited to the Scale plan
Cloud Hobby plan is limited to 1 workspace

faqs.question: Is Formbricks open source?
faqs.answer: Yes, Formbricks is fully open source with code available on GitHub, and it can be self-hosted.

faqs.question: Does Formbricks have a free plan?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Hobby plan is free and includes 250 responses/month and full API access.

faqs.question: Is there a free trial?
faqs.answer: Yes, all Pro plan features are free to try for 14 days with no credit card required.

faqs.question: What certifications does Formbricks have?
faqs.answer: Formbricks is SOC 2 Type II certified and ISO 27001 certified, and states GDPR and CCPA compliance.

use_cases.title: In-app and website feedback
use_cases.description: Product teams trigger surveys based on user behavior across websites and apps.

use_cases.title: Self-hosted survey infrastructure
use_cases.description: Privacy-conscious organizations self-host Formbricks instead of using the cloud version.

use_cases.title: Multi-channel customer research
use_cases.description: Researchers consolidate survey responses collected across web, email, and app channels.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Formbricks?
paragraphs: Formbricks is an open-source experience management platform for building and deploying surveys across websites, in-app experiences, and email, with a self-hosting option alongside its cloud plans.
Its free Hobby plan includes full API access, while paid Pro and Scale plans add branding removal, mobile SDKs, and AI-based feedback labeling and translation.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Formbricks is for
paragraphs: Formbricks suits product and research teams that want multi-channel surveys, as well as privacy-conscious organizations that prefer to self-host their survey infrastructure.

enrichment.short_description: Formsort is a low-code, multi-step form builder for product teams, with conditional logic, A/B testing, and HIPAA/SOC 2 compliance for healthcare intake.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Formsort is a low-code form builder with conditional logic, A/B testing, and HIPAA/SOC 2 compliance, with a free tier and Pro plan from $279/month.

features.title: Multi-step forms with conditional logic
features.description: Build personalized, branching form experiences.

features.title: Dynamic forms
features.description: Populate answer choices dynamically from backend APIs.

features.title: A/B / split testing
features.description: Compare conversion rates across form variants.

features.title: Custom CSS and validation
features.description: Advanced styling and field-level validation.

features.title: Embedded and pre-filled forms
features.description: Embed forms in other pages and pre-fill fields with known data.

features.title: HIPAA and SOC 2 Type II compliance
features.description: Secure handling suitable for patient intake and healthcare workflows.

features.title: EHR integration
features.description: Connects with electronic health record systems for healthcare workflows.

pros: Free plan includes unlimited users and forms with 100 flow starts/month
HIPAA compliance with BAA available for healthcare use cases
Native integrations with BigQuery, Postgres, Redshift, Salesforce, and analytics tools like Segment and Amplitude
Built-in A/B testing for form conversion optimization
cons: Pro plan jumps to $279/month once flow starts exceed the free tier's 100/month
Enterprise pricing is custom and quote-based
No AI capabilities are mentioned on the site

faqs.question: Does Formsort have a free plan?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Free plan supports unlimited users and forms with 100 flow starts/month, though it includes Formsort branding.

faqs.question: What is Formsort's Pro plan price?
faqs.answer: Pro is $279/month (or discounted with annual billing) and supports 1,000 flow starts/month.

faqs.question: Is Formsort HIPAA compliant?
faqs.answer: Yes, Formsort's Enterprise plan includes HIPAA compliance with a BAA.

faqs.question: What integrations does Formsort support?
faqs.answer: Formsort integrates with BigQuery, PostgreSQL, Redshift, Salesforce, Google Sheets, webhooks, Segment, Google Analytics, Optimizely, and Amplitude.

use_cases.title: Patient intake forms
use_cases.description: Healthcare practices use Formsort's HIPAA-compliant forms for patient intake.

use_cases.title: Onboarding and check-in flows
use_cases.description: Product teams build multi-step onboarding forms with conditional logic.

use_cases.title: Lead generation forms
use_cases.description: Marketing agencies build and A/B test lead-capture forms.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Formsort?
paragraphs: Formsort is a low-code form builder that gives product teams full control over multi-step form UX, with conditional logic, dynamic API-driven fields, and built-in A/B testing.
It offers a free tier for smaller usage and HIPAA/SOC 2-compliant paid plans for healthcare and enterprise use.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Formsort is for
paragraphs: Formsort is used by healthcare organizations for patient intake, product teams building onboarding flows, and marketing agencies building and testing lead-capture forms.

enrichment.short_description: Formcarry is a form backend service that turns plain HTML forms into working contact and order forms with email notifications and spam protection.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Formcarry is a form backend API with email notifications, spam protection, and integrations, with a free plan and paid plans starting at $5/month.

features.title: Email notifications
features.description: Instant email alerts for each form submission.

features.title: File uploads
features.description: Accept file uploads directly from connected forms.

features.title: Spam protection
features.description: Built-in spam blocking with a stated 98.6% accuracy rate.

features.title: Field validations
features.description: Automated validation of submitted form fields.

features.title: Auto responses
features.description: Automatic reply emails sent to form submitters.

features.title: Team collaboration
features.description: Invite team members into shared workspaces.

features.title: 3,000+ integrations
features.description: Connect submissions to CRMs, email marketing tools, and other apps.

pros: Free BABY plan available with no cost
Paid plans start as low as $5/month
Works with plain HTML, jQuery, React, or Vue forms without backend code
GDPR and CCPA compliant with data processing agreements available
cons: Free plan is limited to 1 form and 50 submissions/month
Even the $80/month Premium plan caps submissions at 30,000/month
No free trial is mentioned for paid plans

faqs.question: Does Formcarry have a free plan?
faqs.answer: Yes, the BABY plan is free and includes 1 form and 50 submissions/month.

faqs.question: What frameworks does Formcarry support?
faqs.answer: Formcarry works with plain HTML, jQuery, React, and Vue forms.

faqs.question: How is Formcarry priced?
faqs.answer: Paid plans (Starter $5/mo, Basic $15/mo, Premium $80/mo) are billed annually, with a custom Enterprise option available.

faqs.question: Is Formcarry GDPR compliant?
faqs.answer: Yes, Formcarry states GDPR and CCPA compliance with data processing agreements available.

use_cases.title: Static site contact forms
use_cases.description: Developers add working contact forms to static or JAMstack sites without a backend.

use_cases.title: Client order and application forms
use_cases.description: Agencies build order forms and job-application forms for clients.

use_cases.title: Spam-protected form intake
use_cases.description: Teams needing built-in spam filtering without custom server logic.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Formcarry?
paragraphs: Formcarry is a form backend service: users build their own HTML form and point it at a Formcarry API endpoint to get email notifications, file uploads, spam protection, and integrations without writing server code.
It offers a free BABY plan plus paid tiers billed annually, from $5/month up to a custom Enterprise plan.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Formcarry is for
paragraphs: Formcarry is aimed at developers and agencies building contact, order, or job-application forms on static or front-end-only sites, without needing to run their own backend.

enrichment.short_description: Formspark is a form-to-email backend service that lets developers collect HTML form submissions without building server infrastructure.
enrichment.starting_price: $25 one-time (Upgrade bundle, 50% off the regular $50 price)
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Formspark is a form backend service with a free plan, one-time paid bundles, Slack/Zapier integrations, and support for 20+ frontend platforms.

features.title: Submission management
features.description: View submissions by email, an online dashboard, or export as CSV/JSON.

features.title: Integrations
features.description: Send form data to Slack, Zapier, Make, or custom webhooks.

features.title: Customization
features.description: Adjustable thank-you pages, redirect URLs, email templates, and error pages.

features.title: Multi-language support
features.description: Supports 10 languages, including English, Spanish, French, German, and Ukrainian.

features.title: Spam protection
features.description: Built-in spam filtering on all plans, plus optional Botpoison, reCAPTCHA, hCaptcha, or Turnstile.

features.title: Team collaboration
features.description: Unlimited team members per workspace.

pros: Free plan included with every account (250 submissions, 10 forms)
Pay-once data bundles that don't expire, instead of a recurring subscription
Supports 20+ frontend platforms including React, Next.js, Vue, Angular, Svelte, WordPress, and Webflow
Multiple CAPTCHA provider options plus built-in spam filtering
cons: Additional capacity is sold as one-time bundles rather than a scalable recurring plan, requiring manual repurchases as usage grows
Only two pricing tiers are listed (Free and one Upgrade bundle), with no mid-size recurring plan

faqs.question: Does Formspark have a free plan?
faqs.answer: Yes, every account includes a free tier with 250 submissions and 10 forms.

faqs.question: How does Formspark pricing work?
faqs.answer: Formspark uses one-time, non-expiring data bundles (e.g. $25 for 50,000 submissions and 100 forms) rather than recurring subscriptions.

faqs.question: What integrations does Formspark support?
faqs.answer: Formspark integrates with Slack, Zapier, Make, and custom webhooks.

faqs.question: What platforms does Formspark support?
faqs.answer: Formspark supports 20+ platforms including React, Next.js, Vue, Angular, Svelte, WordPress, Webflow, Hugo, Jekyll, and Astro.

use_cases.title: JAMstack contact forms
use_cases.description: Freelancers and agencies embed contact forms into static or JAMstack sites.

use_cases.title: Framework-based apps
use_cases.description: Developers add form handling to React, Vue, or Next.js apps without building backend infrastructure.

use_cases.title: Marketing form data collection
use_cases.description: Marketing teams collect form submissions and route them to Slack or a CRM via Zapier.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Formspark?
paragraphs: Formspark is a form-to-email backend service that lets developers collect HTML form submissions without managing servers or databases, viewing results by email, dashboard, or CSV/JSON export.
Instead of monthly subscriptions, Formspark sells non-expiring data bundles that customers purchase as needed, alongside a free tier included with every account.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Formspark is for
paragraphs: Formspark targets agencies, freelancers, developers, and marketing teams building forms on static sites or JAMstack frameworks who don't want to run their own backend.

enrichment.short_description: Heyflow is a no-code funnel and interactive form builder for lead generation, with native ad tracking, payments, and appointment booking built into the flow.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Heyflow is a no-code funnel builder for lead generation with native server-side ad tracking, A/B testing, and in-flow payments, from $45/month.

features.title: Interactive multi-step funnels
features.description: Show or hide questions based on previous answers to create tailored user journeys.

features.title: Native server-side tracking
features.description: Built-in server-side tracking for Meta CAPI, TikTok, Google Ads, LinkedIn, and Bing.

features.title: Phone-level lead validation
features.description: HLR and SMS OTP verification of phone numbers submitted through a flow.

features.title: Built-in A/B testing
features.description: Compare funnel variants to improve conversion rates.

features.title: In-flow payments, e-signatures, and booking
features.description: Collect Stripe payments, e-signatures, and Calendly-style appointment bookings without leaving the funnel.

features.title: 50+ direct integrations plus Zapier
features.description: Send lead data into CRMs and other tools directly or via Zapier.

pros: Native server-side ad tracking across major ad platforms (Meta, TikTok, Google, LinkedIn, Bing)
Supports payments, e-signatures, and appointment booking within the same funnel
50+ direct integrations plus Zapier access to additional apps
Built-in A/B testing for funnel optimization
cons: Pricing scales primarily with the number of leads generated, which can raise costs at higher volumes
Unlimited visitors, quiz funnels, or the full feature suite require custom/high-volume pricing
Direct access to detailed product documentation was blocked during research, limiting verification of some plan specifics

faqs.question: What is Heyflow?
faqs.answer: Heyflow is a no-code platform for building interactive lead-generation funnels, multi-step forms, and landing pages.

faqs.question: What does Heyflow cost?
faqs.answer: Heyflow plans start from $45/month, with a free test available and custom pricing for high-volume needs.

faqs.question: Does Heyflow support ad tracking?
faqs.answer: Yes, Heyflow offers native server-side tracking for Meta CAPI, TikTok, Google Ads, LinkedIn, and Bing.

faqs.question: Can Heyflow collect payments?
faqs.answer: Yes, Heyflow supports Stripe payments, e-signatures, and appointment booking directly within a funnel.

use_cases.title: Paid lead-generation campaigns
use_cases.description: Performance marketing teams build funnels optimized for cost per lead and use native ad-platform tracking.

use_cases.title: Agency client funnels
use_cases.description: Agencies build interactive funnels for clients that need CRM integration and A/B testing.

use_cases.title: Qualify-and-collect funnels
use_cases.description: Businesses qualify a lead, collect payment, and book a call in a single flow without redirects.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Heyflow?
paragraphs: Heyflow is a no-code platform for building interactive lead-generation funnels, multi-step forms, and landing pages, positioned as a replacement for a stack of separate landing page, form, A/B testing, and tracking tools.
It includes native server-side tracking for major ad platforms and lets flows collect payments, e-signatures, and appointment bookings without redirecting to another tool.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Heyflow is for
paragraphs: Heyflow is aimed at performance marketing teams and agencies running paid lead-generation campaigns who need conversion-optimized funnels with built-in ad tracking and CRM integrations.
